pi_items.source: Sample data structure in setup_task.sh contains all listed segment types
Sample data is hardcoded in setup_task.sh (lines 20-28), created specifically for testing purposes

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic HL7 v2.3 ADT message with patient ID PT89455 containing three repeating Next of Kin (NK1) segments representing relationships: Husband (HUSB), Mother (MOTHER), and Son (SON). The sample data is generated by the setup script and not derived from real healthcare systems. The task requires creating a NextGen Connect channel named 'NK1_to_JSON' listening on TCP port 6661 (MLLP protocol) that transforms these repeating NK1 segments into a JSON array with 'patientId' and 'contacts' fields, writing output to /home/ga/json_out/.
